source_jobs.title: Growth (Performance Marketing)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

 - At coreflow, we're redefining entertainment with AI. We're one of the fastest-growing startups globally, serving 20 million users in our first year. We're an in-person company based in Sydney, Australia.

 - We're guided by a set of principles that are foundational to our work and drive every decision:
   
   - User-first: We build things that people want. We invest time to understand our users and focus on adding value instead of extracting value.
   
   - High agency, high ownership: We're responsible for the pieces we own, end-to-end. We own every mistake, figure out what went wrong, and fix it. We don't blame anyone or anything else.
   
   - Urgency: This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. We prioritize well, find ways to increase leverage, and move at an inspirational pace.


WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - You'll own and scale our performance marketing function end-to-end: strategy, execution, and the number at the bottom of the spreadsheet. You'll operate across unique DSPs and paid acquisition channels, and you'll define the playbook as you go. You live CPMs, CTRs, and CPAs, and you think in payback and incrementality. You run AI-first, with AI tooling as your operating environment, not a side experiment.
   
   


EXAMPLE PROJECTS

 - Own the budget, then 10× it. Run large budgets across multiple DSPs, balancing scale, optimization, and experimentation. You own the allocation call: where the next incremental dollar goes, and why it pays back.

 - Write the expansion playbook. Launch in new regions, networks, and audiences. Find our ideal customers in every corner of the internet, and prove it was them, not noise.

 - Operate the test-and-learn engine. Structured experiments across audiences, creative, placements, and bidding. Frameworks that compound, not one-off tests you forget by Friday.

 - Own attribution and measurement. Diagnose where the funnel leaks from first impression to paid conversion, separate signal from lag, and trust your own read of the data. You'll have full ownership to fix every stage.
   
   


WHAT YOU'LL BRING

 - Extensive performance marketing experience across a range of paid acquisition channels, with real budget ownership behind you.

 - The ability to reason causally about your spend. You're comfortable with attribution, incrementality, and the gap between blended and attributed numbers. You can tell when a metric is lying to you.

 - Hands-on comfort in the data yourself. You can pull the query, read the funnel, and build the model. You don't wait on someone else to tell you what happened.

 - High attention to detail combined with a scrappy, experimental mindset.

 - Creativity paired with an obsession with numbers. We love charts that go up and to the right, and you will too.

 - A hunger to win. This won't be easy, and no one has done it before.




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive compensation with meaningful upside.

 - A company card for food, coffee, tools, and anything that helps you operate at a high level.

 - Daily team lunch and dinner at the office.

 - Unlimited workspace budget. Build your ideal setup.

 - Real ownership and impact from day one.
   
   

 - Based in Sydney and hiring globally. We sponsor visas and offer relocation assistance to help you make the move.


HOW WE THINK ABOUT COMP

Our overarching philosophy is to raise the ceiling for our best performers, not the floor. We pay based on the value you add to the company.

 - The range listed for this role is total comp: cash plus equity combined, with superannuation paid on top.

 - We re-evaluate compensation every 6 months. Bonuses are backward-looking; raises are forward-looking.

 - A bonus rewards work you've already done, like exceptional output or consistently performing above your level.

 - A raise reflects that you've moved up. It resets your baseline to match the higher level you're now operating at.


OUR INTERVIEW PROCESS

 1. A quick phone call to learn about you and share more about our company.

source_jobs.title: Growth (Lifecycle Marketing)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

 - At coreflow, we're redefining entertainment with AI. We're one of the fastest-growing startups globally, serving 20 million users in our first year. We're an in-person company based in Sydney, Australia.

 - We're guided by a set of principles that are foundational to our work and drive every decision:
   
   - User-first: We build things that people want. We invest time to understand our users and focus on adding value instead of extracting value.
   
   - High agency, high ownership: We're responsible for the pieces we own, end-to-end. We own every mistake, figure out what went wrong, and fix it. We don't blame anyone or anything else.
   
   - Urgency: This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. We prioritize well, find ways to increase leverage, and move at an inspirational pace.


WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - You'll own the customer journey from consideration to checkout: turning prospective customers into activated users, free users into paying subscribers, and subscribers into loyal, long-term users. You'll do it through email and in-product messaging, driven by what users actually do, not what we hope they'll do.
   
   


EXAMPLE PROJECTS

 - Build and optimize the lifecycle journeys that matter most: onboarding and activation, free-to-paid conversion, upsells, win-backs, and reactivating lapsed users.

 - Own the promotional and engagement calendar that keeps the community coming back and using the product more.

 - Cut churn where it hurts most, including recovering failed payments and saving at-risk subscribers before they cancel.

 - Develop the behavioral segmentation framework that tells us who to engage, with what, and when, then turn it into automated, triggered journeys.
   
   


WHAT YOU'LL BRING

 - A few years in lifecycle, CRM, or retention marketing, ideally on a subscription or consumer product.

 - A combination of creativity and an obsession with the real numbers: retention, churn, LTV, and free-to-paid conversion, not just open rates and charts that go up and to the right (though we love those too).

 - The ability to get shit done end-to-end, from spotting a drop-off in the data to shipping the journey that fixes it.

 - A hunger to win. This won't be easy, and no one has done it before.




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive compensation with meaningful upside.

 - A company card for food, coffee, tools, and anything that helps you operate at a high level.

 - Daily team lunch and dinner at the office.

 - Unlimited workspace budget. Build your ideal setup.

 - Real ownership and impact from day one.
   
   

 - Based in Sydney and hiring globally. We sponsor visas and offer relocation assistance to help you make the move.


HOW WE THINK ABOUT COMP

Our overarching philosophy is to raise the ceiling for our best performers, not the floor. We pay based on the value you add to the company.

 - The range listed for this role is total comp: cash plus equity combined, with superannuation paid on top.

 - We re-evaluate compensation every 6 months. Bonuses are backward-looking; raises are forward-looking.

 - A bonus rewards work you've already done, like exceptional output or consistently performing above your level.

 - A raise reflects that you've moved up. It resets your baseline to match the higher level you're now operating at.


OUR INTERVIEW PROCESS

 1. A quick phone call to learn about you and share more about our company.

 2. A live challenge, 1hr, working through a toy problem.

 3. A paid work trial, so you get a feel for what it's like to work with us.

 4. You get an offer, and we celebrate!

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer (Site Reliability)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

 - At coreflow, we're redefining entertainment with AI. We're one of the fastest-growing startups globally, serving 20 million users in our first year. We're an in-person company based in Sydney, Australia.

 - We're guided by a set of principles that are foundational to our work and drive every decision:
   
   - User-first: We build things that people want. We invest time to understand our users and focus on adding value instead of extracting value.
   
   - High agency, high ownership: We're responsible for the pieces we own, end-to-end. We own every mistake, figure out what went wrong, and fix it. We don't blame anyone or anything else.
   
   - Urgency: This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. We prioritize well, find ways to increase leverage, and move at an inspirational pace.


WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - You’ll be our first dedicated site reliability engineer, owning reliability and core platform decisions as we scale to hundreds of millions of users.


EXAMPLE PROJECTS

 - Improve uptime and reduce RTO across critical services.

 - Orchestrate and harden GPU clusters serving millions of AI generations per day.

 - Implement platform-wide observability (metrics, tracing, alerting) and enforce SLOs.

 - Optimize AWS infrastructure and reduce cloud spend without sacrificing performance.


WHAT YOU'LL BRING

 - 5+ years operating production systems at scale.

 - Strong AWS experience (infra-as-code, high-scale compute, K8s/ECS or similar).

 - Deep observability and incident response experience.

 - CI/CD and deployment pipeline expertise.

 - Familiarity with our tech stack: TypeScript, Next.js, React, TailwindCSS, tRPC, Postgres, Temporal, AWS.

 - You write code and fix root causes, not just symptoms.

 - Hunger to win. This is not going to be easy.


WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive compensation with meaningful upside.

 - A company card for food, coffee, tools, and anything that helps you operate at a high level.

 - Daily team lunch and dinner at the office.

 - Unlimited workspace budget. Build your ideal setup.

 - Real ownership and impact from day one.

 - Based in Sydney and hiring globally. We sponsor visas and offer relocation assistance to help you make the move.


HOW WE THINK ABOUT COMP

Our overarching philosophy is to raise the ceiling for our best performers, not the floor. We pay based on the value you add to the company.

 - The range listed for this role is total comp: cash plus equity combined, with superannuation paid on top.

 - We re-evaluate compensation every 6 months. Bonuses are backward-looking; raises are forward-looking.

 - A bonus rewards work you've already done, like exceptional output or consistently performing above your level.

 - A raise reflects that you've moved up. It resets your baseline to match the higher level you're now operating at.


OUR INTERVIEW PROCESS

 1. A quick phone call to learn about you and share more about our company.

 2. A technical interview, 1hr of system design, no live coding.

 3. A paid work trial, so you get a feel for what it's like to work with us.

 4. You get an offer, and we celebrate!

source_jobs.title: Growth (Generalist)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

 - At coreflow, we're redefining entertainment with AI. We're one of the fastest-growing startups globally, serving 20 million users in our first year. We're an in-person company based in Sydney, Australia.

 - We're guided by a set of principles that are foundational to our work and drive every decision:
   
   - User-first: We build things that people want. We invest time to understand our users and focus on adding value instead of extracting value.
   
   - High agency, high ownership: We're responsible for the pieces we own, end-to-end. We own every mistake, figure out what went wrong, and fix it. We don't blame anyone or anything else.
   
   - Urgency: This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. We prioritize well, find ways to increase leverage, and move at an inspirational pace.


WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - You'll be one of our founding growth team members: the one who finds the channels no one else has cracked, and scales whatever works. You'll own the strategy and make it real, working hand in hand with product to shape what we ship and with industry partners to open doors no ad account can. As we push toward hundreds of millions of users, you have one goal: help us 3× in the next 3 months.
   
   


EXAMPLE PROJECTS

 - Uncover opportunities: Find novel distribution hacks that no playbook covers. Community empowerment, innovative partnerships, automated advertising, viral content engines. You'll explore it all.

 - From 0 → 1 to 1 → ∞: Scale, automate, and optimize every channel. When you find a strategy that works, you'll turn it into our next 2× growth engine. And you'll know it works because the payback math says so.

 - Own the customer journey: Understand where users drop off, form a hypothesis for why, and run the test that fixes it. The instinct to break a messy funnel into its first principles matters more here than years of experience.

 - Know what actually drove it: You'll live in our analytics stack and own the answer to "what's really working," even when the channels are messy and cross-domain. Scale what drives growth, not what just got credit.

 - Work at the cutting edge: Use the latest AI tools to generate creatives, automate workflows, and increase your leverage. You'll have the autonomy to move fast and own outcomes.
   
   


WHAT YOU'LL BRING

 - A track record from somewhere or something that sharpens people fast: growth at a startup, consulting, finance, or wherever you learned to reason and deliver under pressure. We care about what you've actually done, not how long you've been doing it.

 - The ability to get shit done end-to-end. From understanding users and proposing ideas to building scrappy implementations and scaling them into repeatable processes.

 - A combination of creativity and an obsession with numbers. We love charts that go up and to the right, and you will too.

 - A hunger to win. This won't be easy, and no one has done it before.




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive compensation with meaningful upside.

 - A company card for food, coffee, tools, and anything that helps you operate at a high level.

 - Daily team lunch and dinner at the office.

 - Unlimited workspace budget. Build your ideal setup.

 - Real ownership and impact from day one.

 - Based in Sydney and hiring globally. We sponsor visas and offer relocation assistance to help you make the move.




HOW WE THINK ABOUT COMP

Our overarching philosophy is to raise the ceiling for our best performers, not the floor. We pay based on the value you add to the company.

 - The range listed for this role is total comp: cash plus equity combined, with superannuation paid on top.

 - We re-evaluate compensation every 6 months. Bonuses are backward-looking; raises are forward-looking.

 - A bonus rewards work you've already done, like exceptional output or consistently performing above your level.

 - A raise reflects that you've moved up. It resets your baseline to match the higher level you're now operating at.

source_jobs.title: Data Scientist (Product)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

 - At coreflow, we're redefining entertainment with AI. We're one of the fastest-growing startups globally, serving 20 million users in our first year. We're an in-person company based in Sydney, Australia.

 - We're guided by a set of principles that are foundational to our work and drive every decision:
   
   - User-first: We build things that people want. We invest time to understand our users and focus on adding value instead of extracting value.
   
   - High agency, high ownership: We're responsible for the pieces we own, end-to-end. We own every mistake, figure out what went wrong, and fix it. We don't blame anyone or anything else.
   
   - Urgency: This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. We prioritize well, find ways to increase leverage, and move at an inspirational pace.


WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - You'll own product analytics end-to-end: logging, funnels, experiments, anomaly detection, and investigations that directly shape product decisions.


EXAMPLE PROJECTS

 - Investigate the cause of changes to user behavior. Pinpoint which traffic source, product or infra changes affected which subset of users. Build automated systems to diagnose and investigate this.

 - You'll run A/B tests, including setting up event data, checking implementation details and investigating unexpected results.

 - Independently implement relevant product analytics and logging to understand different customer journeys in detail.


WHAT YOU'LL BRING

 - Hands-on experience with product analytics. You write queries, check data yourself, and make your conclusions traceable and verifiable.

 - Enough technical ability to create and debug event logging, read and write code, understand product flows, and work closely with engineers.

 - A methodical, skeptical approach to investigations. You know the difference between a real insight, a weak signal, and a guess.

 - Hunger to move fast, learn the product deeply, and get to the truth.


WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive compensation with meaningful upside.

 - A company card for food, coffee, tools, and anything that helps you operate at a high level.

 - Daily team lunch and dinner at the office.

 - Unlimited workspace budget to build your ideal setup.

 - Real ownership and impact from day one.

 - Based in Sydney and hiring globally. We sponsor visas and offer relocation assistance to help you make the move.


HOW WE THINK ABOUT COMP

Our overarching philosophy is to raise the ceiling for our best performers, not the floor. We pay based on the value you add to the company.

 - The range listed for this role is total comp: cash plus equity combined, with superannuation paid on top.

 - We re-evaluate compensation every 6 months. Bonuses are backward-looking; raises are forward-looking.

 - A bonus rewards work you've already done, like exceptional output or consistently performing above your level.

 - A raise reflects that you've moved up. It resets your baseline to match the higher level you're now operating at.


OUR INTERVIEW PROCESS

 1. A quick phone call to learn about you and share more about our company.

 2. A data investigation case, 1hr: dig into a real dataset, write the queries yourself, and defend your read of what actually happened.

 3. A paid work trial, so you get a feel for what it's like to work with us.

 4. You get an offer, and we celebrate!

notes: AI-focused entertainment startup with a strong product core
